introLong: Now we will be moving onto the second part of this study. For this section of the study you will be tasked with identifying which of two presented cities has a higher population. These will be cities from the list you were just presented with. You will indicate which of the cities you believe has a higher population with a mouse click. When you are ready to begin this portion of the study please press the spacebar.

Now we will be moving onto the second part of this study. For this section of the study you will be tasked with identifying which of two presented cities is higher above sea level. These will be cities from the list you were just presented with. You will indicate which of the cities you believe is higher above sea level (in feet) with a mouse click. When you are ready to begin this portion of the study please press the spacebar.
